overview.description: The GraniteShares 2x Long TSM Daily ETF (TSMU) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in information technology equity. The fund provides 2x leveraged exposure, less fees and expenses, to the daily price movement for shares of Taiwan Semiconductor Manufacturing Co Ltd (ticker: TSM) stock. TSMU was launched on Nov 11, 2024 and is issued by GraniteShares.
